name: arcadia-website
description: The public facing portal of Arcadia, designed to share knowledge outward and provide access to key resources from the principal island

scripts.lint:deps:missing: npx depcheck --json | npx node-jq --sort-keys '.' | npx node-jq '.missing | keys | .[]' | xargs npm add -D
scripts.lint:deps:unused: npx depcheck --json | npx node-jq --sort-keys '.' | npx node-jq '.devDependencies[]' | xargs npm uninstall
